mechanics.excerpt: RECOVERING YOUR EDGE When character pushes his luck; the Edge spent is tem porarily deducted from his Edge Attribute This affects him as any reduced Attribute would until the spent Edge is recovered_ The reduction is not permanent, SO you need not recover the ost Edge through actual character advancement: The char acter' maximum Edge Attribute represents the character $ average helping" of good fortune. His current Edge represents reduction in fortune due t0 pushing his luck.
